message:
refactor(codegen): Complete ExprEmitter migration for all block_label_counter usages

Migrate remaining files to use ExprEmitter.reserveLabelId() instead of
manual block_label_counter manipulation:

- methods/string.zig: 9 patterns (encode, decode, partition, format, etc.)
- methods/dict.zig: 9 patterns (get, keys, values, items, pop, etc.)
- methods/set.zig: 12 patterns (copy, update, union, intersection, etc.)
- builtins/conversions/collections.zig: 9 patterns
- expressions/comprehensions.zig: 8 patterns
- expressions/collections.zig: 3 patterns
- statements/control/loops/for_basic.zig: 7 patterns
- Plus numerous other files with 1-3 patterns each

This completes the ExprEmitter infrastructure plan. All codegen files now
use centralized label ID management through exprEmitter().reserveLabelId(),
eliminating the risk of forgetting to increment counters or label collisions.
